prompt: Procurement, IT, and SAM disagree on who creates entitlements from purchase orders. Which stakeholder alignment approach should the program lead facilitate?
choices: Document RACI responsibilities for entitlement creation, contract linkage, and reconciliation validation in a operating model workshop
Allow each team to maintain separate entitlement spreadsheets without integration
Restrict entitlement edits to a single admin account with no business ownership
Defer alignment until the first true-up invoice arrives
explanation: Implementation success depends on clear ownership for entitlement stewardship across procurement, IT, and SAM functions.

prompt: Go-live is six weeks away for the first publisher pack and reconciliation schedule. Which readiness checkpoint validates operational readiness?
choices: End-to-end test of discovery normalization, entitlement import, reconciliation, and remediation on a pilot software model set
Confirm only that SAM plugins appear active in the application navigator
Skip reconciliation testing because publisher packs include default rules
Delay readiness validation until after production cutover
explanation: Readiness assessments exercise the full SAM pipeline with representative data before enterprise scheduling and reporting go live.

prompt: A SAM implementation must integrate service catalog requests in release two while release one focuses on data foundations. How should the roadmap prioritize work?
choices: Complete discovery, normalization, and entitlement accuracy in release one before enabling fulfillment checks in release two
Launch catalog integration first because it delivers the most visible user experience
Postpone all entitlement work until catalog items are published
Run reconciliation only after every catalog item has been requested at least once
explanation: Implementation roadmaps sequence trustworthy install and entitlement data before provisioning integrations that depend on accurate license position.

prompt: The SAM team must onboard five new publishers during the same quarter as discovery expansion. Which planning practice prevents compliance gaps?
choices: Sequence publisher onboarding with validated software models, contract imports, and test reconciliations per publisher
Import all contracts simultaneously without software model mappings
Enable reconciliation globally before any publisher-specific rules are tested
Exclude new publishers from reporting until the following fiscal year
explanation: Publisher onboarding plans tie model setup, entitlement loading, and reconciliation validation together to avoid partial compliance coverage.

prompt: Executive sponsors ask how SAM success will be measured in the first ninety days post go-live. Which early outcome metric is most appropriate?
choices: Percentage of prioritized publishers with reconciled position and resolved import or normalization errors
Total number of software models created regardless of mapping quality
Count of users granted sam_admin access
Discovery probe volume without reference to normalized install coverage
explanation: Early implementation metrics focus on trustworthy compliance data for priority publishers before broad optimization campaigns.
